narrative:
Strongsville-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,142 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.2 percentage points.
